rulings.Case Title: PURE ENTERTAINMENT LLC, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED VS. SHUI KING KWON HOM et al
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday May 21, 2018, line 1. DEFENDANT STEPHEN HOM, ADMINISTRATOR OF THE ESTATE OF SHUI DEMURRER TO 4TH AMENDED COMPLAINT Hearing Required to address whether the time to bring a motion under CCP 377.41 has lapsed. See Probate Code 9370(a)(3). = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: PURE ENTERTAINMENT LLC, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED VS. SHUI KING KWON HOM et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Pure Entertainment, Llcs Joinder In Vlad Coods Motion To Dismiss Cross-Complaint With Prejudice
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday May 21, 2018, line 1. CROSS DEFENDANT PURE ENTERTAINMENT LLC, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED Pure Entertainment, Llcs Joinder In Vlad Coods Motion To Dismiss Cross-Complaint With Prejudice DENIED in part and GRANTED in part. Cross-Defendant's motion for dismissal under discretionary provisions is DENIED. Cross-Complaint was being prosecuted until March 2016. Thereafter the time to bring the case to trial was tolled until the Personal Representative was appointed. It has only been 10 months since the appointment. Motion to Re-Set the Motion for Summary Judgment is GRANTED. Summary Judgment shall be heard on June 20, 2018. By no later May 25, 2018 Mr. Cordova shall provide courtesy copies of any filings made in support of or in opposition to the Motion for Summary Judgement. No further briefing. However, if trial is continued, hearing on June 20, 2018 will be vacated and Cross-Complainant may fail a new Motion for Summary Judgment on proper notice. New briefing shall be filed. By no later than June 13, 2018 parties to submit a joint declaration regarding outcome of the Motion to Continue trial. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: AERC 8TH & HARRISON LLC VS. JEFFREY SMITH ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Quash Service
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday May 21, 2018, line 7. DEFENDANT JEFFREY SMITH Notice Of Motion And Motion To Quash Service DENIED. Motion to Quash is not a proper means to challenge the veracity of the allegations in the Complaint regarding service of the 3 Day Notice. = (501/REQ)
